channel.title: Observability on ngeran[io]
channel.description: Recent content in Observability on ngeran[io]

item.title: Beyond the Ping: Mastering TWAMP on Juniper MX
item.description: A production TWAMP-Light deployment on Juniper MX — three QoS classes (Voice, Video, Best Effort), bidirectional measurement, line-by-line config explanation, and verification commands.
